title: agrostis reygeri
intro: Agrostis reygeri, also known as Reyger's bentgrass, is a type of grass species in the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Agrostis reygeri include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and soothing coughs. Agrostis reygeri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to alleviate respiratory problems.
